Visited SF with my husband and we had to visit. The museum is quite small but it's definitely worth visiting, just to read up on the history of the area. Really informative. And the staff were really friendly. The price is reasonable and it's nice to know it goes to the upkeep of the museum.

I hope they find a way to make this museum bigger.  I was hoping for something more substantial.  The stuff they have there is powerful and very educational.  I would love them to expand on the Harvey Milk and AIDS exhibits.  I'd love to see more stuff on the post war period as well.
